overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing exploration of an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The camera ascends stone stairs, walks along an avenue lined with black sphinx statues, and passes through a monumental gate with colossal pharaoh statues. Bright sunlight illuminates the sandy stone architecture and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple approach with grand stone stairs

events.description: turns right to view sphinx statue while ascending stairs
reaches upper platform with decorated pillars and turns toward temple

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs toward the temple complex, pausing to observe the sphinx statues on the right

entered.detail: wide stone stairs leading up to the temple complex
large black stone sphinx statue with detailed headdress
tall palm trees framing the temple approach
twin massive stone temple towers with hieroglyphic carvings and flags
tall dark obelisk with golden tip

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a wide stone stairway leading to an ancient Egyptian temple. The camera ascends the stairs, turning slightly to reveal a large black sphinx statue on the right. Palm trees frame the approach, and twin temple towers rise in the distance against a clear sky. The scene is bright and sunny with sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial avenue lined with sphinx statues leading to temple

events.description: turns left to follow the avenue of sphinxes toward the temple
more NPCs become visible walking through the plaza toward the gate

agents.ego_description: walking along the grand avenue passing rows of black sphinx statues, approaching the main temple gate

notable_agents.action: temple visitor in robes walking toward the gate

entered.detail: row of identical black sphinx statues lining the ceremonial path
wide open plaza with patterned stone tiles

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a grand ceremonial avenue lined with rows of black sphinx statues on the right. The twin temple towers shift to the left as the camera advances. Several NPCs in ancient Egyptian attire walk through the plaza. The ground is paved with stone tiles, and palm trees continue to dot the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental stone gate with colossal pharaoh statues

events.description: approaches the massive stone gate flanked by colossal standing statues
passes through the gate into the shadowed interior passage

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the monumental gate with towering pharaoh statues, moving into the inner temple complex

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch near the gate entrance

entered.detail: massive stone gate with two colossal pharaoh statues flanking the entrance
tall stone block walls of the temple structure
decorative stone pillars with black and gold bands

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a monumental stone gate guarded by two colossal pharaoh statues. The avenue of sphinxes falls behind as the camera moves toward the entrance. After passing through the gate, the scene transitions into a shadowed stone passage with walls on both sides. A guard stands near the entrance as the camera enters the inner temple complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the base of a sun-drenched temple stairway into the shadowed depths of an inner sanctuary. It begins by ascending wide stone stairs framed by palm trees, turning slightly to reveal a large black sphinx statue as twin temple towers rise in the distance. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts along a grand ceremonial avenue lined with rows of black sphinxes and populated by figures in ancient Egyptian attire. The scene then opens toward a monumental stone gate guarded by two colossal pharaoh statues, leaving the open plaza behind. Finally, the camera passes through the gateway and transitions from the bright sunlight into a narrow, shadowed stone passage guarded by a sentinel.
